validation_gates.reason: Repository, pinned base, target path, two-file change budget, review-branch route, connector/API execution, non-goals, validation plan, and stop conditions were resolved before mutation.
Repository identity, visibility, permissions, default branch, immutable base SHA, target blob, path-scoped instructions, open PR state, and competing branch state were checked.

The README remains under the canonical tests responsibility root, classifies air as compatibility-only, redirects executable work to atmosphere, and records the unresolved slug choice as ADR-class rather than creating parallel authority.

No duplicate document ID, matching open PR, or task branch surfaced; v0.2 supersedes the nine-line stub at the same path and does not claim schema, contract, policy, source, evidence, release, UI, API, map, AI, or alert authority.
Bounded search surfaced only this README under tests/domains/air while preserving UNKNOWN for unindexed, historical, generated, external, or differently named files.

The revision defines redirect behavior, duplicate-collection and fixture controls, finite outcomes, reason codes, no-network posture, official-authority redirection, migration acceptance, correction, and rollback without activating the alias.
The original instruction to use tests/domains/atmosphere for implementation work is retained and expanded; no strong existing material was removed.

The inspected domain-atmosphere workflow triggers on pull requests but contains checkout plus TODO echo steps; no secret-bearing, privileged write, deployment, or publication behavior was established.
The remotely committed UTF-8 README has one H1, 854 lines, a final newline, balanced fences, unique heading slugs, and 42 internal links resolving under the local GitHub-style anchor check.
No credentials, private endpoints, proprietary observations, exact non-public sensor locations, operational emergency instructions, restricted payloads, or publication authorization were introduced.
Remote Git blob 57a1df863d1dfb25cfc9c902bf3ec81bb9795bed matches the locally reconstructed content; SHA-256 is 0a504cd776881f1f1a0cd9fed272b424e2272c4022afa4a16e3992c6ca00d55d.
The scoped change creates no executable test or implementation and the compatibility lane is README-only in bounded evidence.
Pull-request checks are unavailable until the draft PR is opened; inspected Atmosphere CI is TODO-only and cannot establish substantive coverage.
The receipt was checked against the inspected generated-receipt field, enum, pattern, and review-state requirements.

notes: AI-authored documentation-only compatibility revision prepared against pinned main-branch evidence under a two-file final change budget. The target remains a slug guardrail, not an executable test package or authority surface.
